docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL DICKSTEIN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL DICKSTEIN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
